text: The bond between writer and dragon is more than a saddle and a shared sky.
It is a thread of the soul.
And now, Kaelin pulls upon that thread, not for flight, but for life.
She pours her own warmth, her own energy into her dying friend.
It is agony, a hollowing sensation.
But for a moment, a single scale remembers its green, a flicker.
Enough, it is always enough to take one more step toward hope.
